Hall of Fame

Award Winners

Celebrating the technologies and innovations recognized for excellence by the SXSCLI Awards across every category.

2026

AI

AI Model of the Year

GPT-5

For groundbreaking advances in multimodal reasoning and general intelligence capabilities.

Coding AI

Coding AI of the Year

Claude Code

For revolutionizing software development with agentic coding capabilities.

Open Source

Open Source AI of the Year

Llama 4

For democratizing access to state-of-the-art AI capabilities.

Languages

Programming Language of the Year

Rust

For highest growth in adoption and expanding into new domains beyond systems programming.

Frameworks

Framework of the Year

Next.js

For setting the standard in full-stack React development and server components.

Innovation

Innovation Award

Cursor AI

For pioneering the AI-native IDE paradigm and transforming developer workflows.

DX

Developer Experience Award

Astro

For exceptional developer experience with content-first web development.

Rising Star

Rising Star Award

Hono

For rapid adoption growth and innovation in edge computing frameworks.

2025

AI

AI Model of the Year

GPT-4

For establishing new benchmarks in AI reasoning and multimodal understanding.

Coding AI

Coding AI of the Year

GitHub Copilot

For mainstream adoption of AI-assisted programming.

Languages

Programming Language of the Year

TypeScript

For becoming the de facto standard for professional web development.

Frameworks

Framework of the Year

Next.js

For pioneering Server Components and the App Router architecture.

Independent rankings and awards for AI, developers, and technology.
